info.name: AgroOrbit API - Testes completos GS Java
info.description: Collection com token fix, manualAlert boolean e mainUserEmail ajustado para teste.editado1780357062@agroorbit00.com.

request.description: Execute primeiro. Salva token na collection, environment e global.

exec: if (json.data && json.data.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('testUserId', json.data.id); pm.environment.set('testUserId', json.data.id); }
if (json.content && json.content[0] && json.content[0].id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('testUserId', json.content[0].id); pm.environment.set('testUserId', json.content[0].id); }

item.name: Buscar usuário inexistente - deve dar erro

exec: pm.test('Status de erro esperado', function () { pm.expect([400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (json.data && json.data.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('farmId', json.data.id); pm.environment.set('farmId', json.data.id); }
if (json.content && json.content[0] && json.content[0].id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('farmId', json.content[0].id); pm.environment.set('farmId', json.content[0].id); }

item.name: Buscar fazenda inexistente - deve dar erro

item.name: Criar NDVI inválido - deve dar erro

exec: pm.test('Status de erro esperado', function () { pm.expect([400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Executar análise de risco do talhão

item.name: Executar análise de risco de talhão inexistente - deve dar erro

exec: pm.test('Status de erro esperado', function () { pm.expect([400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (Array.isArray(json) && json.length > 0 && json[0].id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('alertId', json[0].id); pm.environment.set('alertId', json[0].id); }

item.name: Resolver alerta inexistente - deve dar erro

exec: pm.test('Status de erro esperado', function () { pm.expect([400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (Array.isArray(json) && json.length > 0 && json[0].id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('recommendationId', json[0].id); pm.environment.set('recommendationId', json[0].id); }
